meta.name: Cemaco Inspection Report Review – Rules Reference

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection product list (client-uploaded files) — Verify that all client-uploaded inspection files (artwork, specifications, etc.) have been reviewed before starting the inspection. If the supplier offers any conversation record relevant to the inspection, a dated screenshot must be included in the report.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check only that the uploaded files were reviewed and any supplier conversation record is captured
checkpoints.context: QUESTION — check only that the uploaded files were reviewed and any supplier conversation record is captured

checkpoints.requirement: Specification sheets — Confirm the report references the client's product specification (artwork, color, label, barcode, shipping mark) for each SKU inspected.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check that each SKU's findings reference the corresponding specification sheet
checkpoints.context: SECTION — cross-check that each SKU's findings reference the corresponding specification sheet

check_block.check: extract_bool("Does this field evidence satisfy: Confirm the report references the client's product specification (artwork, color, label, barcode, shipping mark) for eac?")

checkpoints.requirement: Report front page — inspection date fields — The number of days the inspection was postponed or advanced versus the originally planned date must always be stated. "N/A" is not accepted, even for a missing report.

Report front page — Factory / Vendor details — Factory name, address, and site representative must be recorded in English, even if the factory only confirmed them in Chinese. Vendor details must also be completed.
Report — production line photo — A picture of the factory's production line must be included in the report.

Final PDF file — The PDF report sent to the client must be under 15MB. If it exceeds this, pictures must be compressed and the PDF regenerated; if still over 15MB, the QIMA quality team must be notified.
checkpoints.scope_detail: check final file size against all embedded images
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — check final file size against all embedded images

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection site / availability remark — If goods belonging to the supplier are at another location no more than a 5–15 minute walk away, the inspection may proceed; the location must be reflected in the report and the back office notified. For new suppliers in China, the inspection address must be reconfirmed by e-mail beforehand.

Available Quantity Check — If products are not ready for inspection, the inspector must check available/semi-finished product, request packing material from the factory if available, and mark the inspection FAILED. If nothing is available at all, a MISSED REPORT must be issued instead.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check quantity available on-site against the pass/fail/missed decision
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check quantity available on-site against the pass/fail/missed decision

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection coordination note — If the inspection takes place in a warehouse that does not belong to the factory or the supplier, the inspector must contact the QIMA quality team before proceeding.

check_block.check: extract_bool("Does this field evidence satisfy: If the inspection takes place in a warehouse that does not belong to the factory or the supplier, the inspector must con?")

checkpoints.requirement: Inspection start time / remark — If goods are not ready when the inspector arrives, the inspector must wait until at least part of the goods are available, notify the back office and SIC, and wait until 2:00 PM local time before issuing a missing inspection report if goods remain unavailable.
Random carton selection / Selected cartons — Carton and product selection must follow QIMA's Standard Operating Process (SOP) for random sampling.

Approval Sample Comparison — When no approval sample is provided by the factory (standard for Cemaco), the inspector must verify that all on-site findings (product, plug type, packaging) are fully aligned with the specification file, with no assumptions or interpretation.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check product/plug/packaging findings against the booking specification file
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check product/plug/packaging findings against the booking specification file

checkpoints.requirement: Product Style & Construction — hangtag — The hangtag physically attached to each product must match that exact product's SKU, description, and specification exactly — hangtags must never be mixed between products or SKUs.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check hangtag content against product SKU and specification file
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check hangtag content against product SKU and specification file

checkpoints.requirement: Product Style & Construction — barcode — The barcode printed on the product must be verified against both the hangtag barcode and the packing list/file; any discrepancy between the three must be reported.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check barcode on product, hangtag, and packing file
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check barcode on product, hangtag, and packing file

checkpoints.requirement: Product Labels / Product Details – Barcode — Barcode scanning result must be recorded for each SKU, with a photo of both the barcode label and the scan result.

check_block.check: extract_bool("Does this field satisfy the GI requirement stated for this checkpoint?")

checkpoints.requirement: Photo captions / TAG feature (QIMAone) — Photos must be organized and captioned by SKU using the TAG feature in QIMAone; photo captions must always reflect the correct SKU.
Outer Packing & Shipping Marks: Front & Side — carton quantity marking — The quantity marked on the outer carton must match the quantity specified in the client's order file for that SKU exactly.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check carton marking against order file quantity
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check carton marking against order file quantity

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — plug type / certification (E&E products) — Plug type and certification markings on the product/adaptor must match the certification required in the booking specification (e.g., UL vs. EU plug).
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check plug type/certification against booking specification
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check plug type/certification against booking specification

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — market-specific labels — Labels not required for the client's destination market (e.g., a yellow ENERGYGUIDE sticker for a market that doesn't require it) must not be present on the product/packaging; if found, it must be reported as a deviation from the approved artwork.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check labels present against market requirements in the booking specification
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check labels present against market requirements in the booking specification

checkpoints.requirement: Outer Packing & Shipping Marks — printed component/feature count — Any printed specification on the product packaging (e.g., LED light count, piece count) must match the booking specification exactly.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check printed packaging text against booking specification
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check printed packaging text against booking specification

checkpoints.requirement: Inner Packing & Unit Packing — warning sticker — Warning/advisory stickers on inner or unit packaging must be firmly adhered with no lifting edges, positioned as specified in the packing manual, and match the required dimensions.

Product Color Specification Check / insert card — The color of any insert card, color box, or gift box must be compared against the Pantone reference stated in the client's artwork, with a photo of the comparison. If TCX/TPG Pantone references are unavailable, use the STD Pantone.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check insert card/color box color against the artwork's Pantone reference
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check insert card/color box color against the artwork's Pantone reference

checkpoints.requirement: Color boxes — photography — For color/gift boxes, one picture must be taken per surface (e.g., 6 pictures for a 6-sided box); the client's artwork should be enlarged for detailed comparison.

check_block.check: extract_bool("Does this field evidence satisfy: For color/gift boxes, one picture must be taken per surface (e.g., 6 pictures for a 6-sided box); the client's artwork s?")

checkpoints.requirement: Defects checklist — Every defect must be recorded by SKU, with a supporting photo for each defect found; factory and vendor information must be completed.
Product Color Specification Check — Color shade must be checked and compared across all inspected items/colors selected for the inspection — not only one representative color per SKU or series.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check color consistency across all units/colors of the same item inspected
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check color consistency across all units/colors of the same item inspected

checkpoints.requirement: Workmanship — metal items — For all-metal items, moisture level must be checked to assess the potential for rust or mildew; screws (if assembled) or loose parts/components (if not assembled) must be checked for rust.

Product Dimensions Result / Product Weights Result — When the client provides no specific dimension specification, the general dimension and weight of the product must still be checked, on 5 pieces per item.

Inspection standards — Workmanship / Measurement sampling — Workmanship and measurement sampling must follow the Inspection Profile (IP) defined for the order; no separate Cemaco-specific AQL table exists beyond the IP.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check sample size/AQL applied in the report against the IP
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check sample size/AQL applied in the report against the IP

checkpoints.requirement: Product Dimensions Result — measurement chart — All measurements taken during inspection must be recorded in the client's official measurement chart ([Cemaco Nuevos Almacenes] [Measurements Template]).
Tests checklist — memory foam pillow — For memory foam pillow products, both the filling and the assembled pillow must be weighed separately.

Tests checklist — Container Load Check (CLC) — For CLC inspections, no product quality checks are required; the inspector should instead focus on the container's condition and confirm pallets are loaded horizontally.
Tests checklist — Metal Detection Test — The Metal Detection Test is mandatory for all tablecloth and cushion product inspections.

Product Style & Construction (main page) — One product photo per SKU is required; if an SKU has multiple colors, a separate photo is required for each color, with all SKUs combined into a single photo on the first page of the report.
General photo requirement — The front view of the product must always be included and placed on the main page for each SKU.

check_block.check: extract_bool("Does this field evidence satisfy: The front view of the product must always be included and placed on the main page for each SKU.?")

checkpoints.requirement: General cosmetics — measurement/carton/packing photos — Each SKU section must include: product measurement photos, carton box size/weight photos (with a carton photo even when no SKU marking appears on the carton), packing photos, and shipping mark photos.
Inspection type / sampling level field (report header) — Verify the sampling level and AQL used in the report match the Inspection Profile (IP) defined for the order.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check applied AQL/sample size against the order's IP
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check applied AQL/sample size against the order's IP

checkpoints.requirement: Overall result (report header) — Overall result must be PASS only if ALL conditions below are met. If any single condition fails, overall result must be FAIL.
checkpoints.scope_detail: cross-check overall result against all checkpoint findings in the report
checkpoints.context: FULL REPORT — cross-check overall result against all checkpoint findings in the report
